epidemiological_logistics: Delivery of 5 tons of medicines (support UG-PDSS). Delivery of demarcation nets to Bunia CME.
27 vehicles + 4 ambulances deployed. Delivery of UNICEF motorcycles: Rwampara (21), Mangala (2), Biringi (1), Linga (1), Rethy (2), Lolwa (1).
Monitoring of CTE construction works at Bunia General Referral Hospital, Bunia CME, and Rwampara General Referral Hospital.
Start of effective reception of the 1,800 central government motorcycles for all pillar teams in Ituri.
Inauguration and commissioning of the standardised ETC at CME Rwampara, newly rehabilitated.
